reviews.body: High Street is a lovely branch and the staff are always so well turned out and approachable.
I opened two accounts, one an ISA and the other not. I made a deposit to the wrong account. They telephoned me to establish my needs and made the appropriate deposits.

I needed to transfer some money for a purchase which Joyce at the leyland branch was excellent. She helped me to set up an online account so i could excess the money by the following morning. I would recommend Joyce for any advice and help. She was so lovely explained everything didn’t make me feel silly that I couldn’t set it up myself. I’m not technical myself so I was so grateful for her help and patience. Thank you so much. Lynn
They were excellent through our self build. Lending to us when others would not. Their team is always so friendly and accessible to speak with. Very happy with their products and service.
Rang Julie Rigby to get a lost cheque cancelled.Was reassured and she cautioned it right away.Not only got to speak to a real person but the response was amazing.
Really knowledgeable staff that took the time to explain everything to me.  Very happy with my chosen account and rate.
Its great to be able to have a direct conversation with a highly knowledgably, professional, mortgage expert. Highly recommend Mark Rothwell.
Devon Park was our mortgage broker contact at Chorley building society. She made it a seamless and pleasurable service from start to finish. Friendly knowledgeable and timely. Would recommend highly.

The Chorley are always quick to answer the phone and you get to speak with someone at the branch (Not a call centre) I spoke to Julie Rigby (3 times over the course of a week or so) Julie was very helpful (and patient) in assisting me with the on-line process, which I never usually get involved with. Although I've now closed the account, I'd be very happy to save with the Chorley again.

Our mortgage advisor Mr Mark Rothwell was extremely helpful and very professional regarding every aspect of our mortgage. He was extremely polite and informative, and made the whole process less stressful.  All future business,  we would welcome Mr. Mark Rothwell to deal with it for us. Excellant service.

As always, excellent personal service. Dealing with Mutual Building Society’s is the way way forward, where you are very much treated as a person and not a number. A big thanks to Candice for all her assistance throughout
